title: Hem Seven Chakra Pouch, 7 Packs includes 35 Incense Sticks for Meditation, Yoga, Relaxation, Healing and Positivity By Rushant
features: 7 Chakras have a very important role to play in your body with regards to health & balance. 7 chakras means the 7 centers in your body which starts at the base of your spine & ends at top of your head.
This incense sticks are benefical to people love to meditate, practice yoga or who simply wish to use aromatherapy to fill their environment with natural aromas.
Hem Seven Chakra Pouch pack of 35 Incense sticks | Agarbatti for Meditation | Gift items |Pouch of Agarbatthies for Healing & Spirituality
Incense sticks can be used for Aromatherapy, Yoga, Weddings, Reiki, Meditation, Healing, Sensual, Positivity, Relaxation
Each incense stick is individually hand rolled in the high quality oils so each sticks can vary slightly in its thickness.
description: Over a period of 40 years, HEM has pioneered the art of incense making. We manufacture a wide range of incense products for our consumers. HEM Incense sticks with its signature aroma not only create an spiritual and enthralling atmosphere but also inspires confidence, optimism and joyfulness. Our Agarbatthies are beneficial in your prayers, to deepen your spirituality, to practice yoga & meditation, provide a soothing aroma and relax. HEM Incense stick is made by creating a unique blend of charcoal, essential oils, fragrance oils, herbs, flowers and resins, this combination creates an amazing and pleasant aromatic smell, offering you the best experience for all your purpose. Fragrance: Crown (Sahasrara the 7th chakra),Third Eye (Ajna the 6th chakra,Throat (Vishuddha the 5th chakra),Heart (Anahta the 4th chakra),Solar Plexus (Manipura the 3rd chakra),Sacral (Swadhishthana the 2nd chakra) and Root (Muladhara the 1st chakra).

specifications_table.Material: ‎Charcoal, Essential Oils, Fragrance Oils, Herbs, Flowers, Resins
